'''sajafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadbot|deadbot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadbot|deadbot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sajafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæjæfæth|sæjæfæth]] || [[word:sæjæfæj|sæjæfæj]] || [[word:sæjæfæsh|sæjæfæsh]] || [[word:sæjæfæ|sæjæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajajafath|sajajafath]] || [[word:sajajafaj|sajajafaj]] || [[word:sajajafash|sajajafash]] || [[word:sajajafa|sajajafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajafath|sajafath]] || [[word:sajafaj|sajafaj]] || [[word:sajafash|sajafash]] || [[word:sajafa|sajafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajaffath|sajaffath]] || [[word:sajaffaj|sajaffaj]] || [[word:sajaffash|sajaffash]] || [[word:sajaffaf|sajaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sajafatha|sajafatha]] || [[word:sajafaja|sajafaja]] || [[word:sajafasha|sajafasha]] || [[word:sajafaka|sajafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sajafath|sajafath]] || [[word:sajafaj|sajafaj]] || [[word:sajafash|sajafash]] || [[word:sajafa|sajafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sajafathal|sajafathal]] || [[word:sajafajal|sajafajal]] || [[word:sajafashal|sajafashal]] || [[word:sajafakal|sajafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sajafathatha|sajafathatha]] || [[word:sajafajaja|sajafajaja]] || [[word:sajafashasha|sajafashasha]] || [[word:sajafaka|sajafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sajafathan|sajafathan]] || [[word:sajafajan|sajafajan]] || [[word:sajafashan|sajafashan]] || [[word:sajafakan|sajafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sajafathaoro|sajafathaoro]] || [[word:sajafajaoro|sajafajaoro]] || [[word:sajafashaoro|sajafashaoro]] || [[word:sajafakaoro|sajafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
